cpm Fitted Object

Source: R/cpm.R
cpm.Rd

A cpm object is returned by fit() when fitting a cpm_spec() on a single dataset.

Structure

A cpm object is a list with the following elements:

call

Matched call used for fitting.

spec

The originating cpm_spec object.

params

Parameter list used at fit time.

predictions

Data frame of observation-level outputs with columns row, real, both, pos, and neg.

edges

Stored single-fit edge mask as a p x 2 logical matrix with pos and neg columns.

model

Trained CPM model components used by prediction.

See also

fit(), summary.cpm(), tidy.cpm()
